{
  "errorCode": "chain_error",
  "message": "On-chain transaction failed.",
  "hint": "Transaction was rejected by the Solana runtime. Inspect the embedded logs in the cause for the failing program invoke + the precise runtime error; in a SendTransactionError handler, call `getLogs()` for the full set.",
  "cause": "Simulation failed. 
Message: Transaction simulation failed: Error processing Instruction 0: custom program error: 0xbc4. 
Logs: 
[
  "Program HF8zHfoyA7b5mhLViopTnRMprc6ZT5KActHTdkFrih2N invoke [1]",
  "Program log: Instruction: RegisterAgentViaCpi",
  "Program log: AnchorError caused by account: authority. Error Code: AccountNotInitialized. Error Number: 3012. Error Message: The program expected this account to be already initialized.",
  "Program HF8zHfoyA7b5mhLViopTnRMprc6ZT5K... [truncated]"
}

structuredContent.hint: Transaction was rejected by the Solana runtime. Inspect the embedded logs in the cause for the failing program invoke + the precise runtime error; in a SendTransactionError handler, call `getLogs()` for the full set.
